name: YouTube Downloader
description: Paste a YouTube link and download the video or just the audio, with full control over resolution, bitrate, and output format. Keeps a history of everything you've downloaded.
details:
Paste a YouTube URL, luma fetches the video's title, thumbnail, and duration, then lets you choose exactly what to download:

- Video (MP4) at any available resolution, up to the source's best quality
- Audio only, as MP3, M4A, or Opus, at a bitrate you choose (96–320 kbps)

Downloads run through a locally managed copy of yt-dlp and ffmpeg (fetched automatically on first use, kept in luma's app data folder — nothing is bundled into the app itself). Progress, speed, and ETA are shown live, and every completed download is kept in a history list so you can jump straight to the file.
